articles.description: Portland Trail Blazers (38-38, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Clippers (39-36, eighth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Clippers face the Trail Blazers on 5-game win streak

articles.description: Charlotte Hornets (39-36, 10th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Brooklyn Nets (18-57, 13th in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Charlotte takes on Brooklyn for conference showdown

articles.description: Philadelphia 76ers (41-33, seventh in the Eastern Conference) vs. Miami Heat (39-36, ninth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Miami plays Philadelphia on home slide

articles.description: Detroit Pistons (54-20, first in the Eastern Conference) vs. Oklahoma City Thunder (59-16, first in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Oklahoma City looks for 60th win this season in matchup with Detroit

articles.description: Boston Celtics (50-24, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Atlanta Hawks (42-33, sixth in the Eastern Conference)
articles.headline: Celtics play the Hawks, look for 4th straight win

articles.description: New York Knicks (48-27, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Houston Rockets (45-29, sixth in the Western Conference)
articles.headline: Houston plays New York in non-conference matchup

videos.description: Landry Shamet gets the Knicks going with an and-1 after New York wins the jump ball.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Landry Shamet drops in early and-1 for the Knicks) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Landry Shamet drops in early and-1 for the Knicks

videos.description: Klay Thompson pulls up from downtown and sinks the 3-pointer for the Mavericks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Klay Thompson gets 3-pointer to fall for Dallas) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Klay Thompson gets 3-pointer to fall for Dallas

videos.description: Josh Hart gets the ball in the corner and drains a 3-pointer for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Josh Hart cashes in from the corner for New York) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Josh Hart cashes in from the corner for New York

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns flies to the rack and throws down a massive dunk over Daniel Gafford.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KAT throws it down over Gafford) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: KAT throws it down over Gafford

videos.description: Jaden Hardy pulls up from the wing and knocks down the 3-pointer for the Mavericks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaden Hardy drops in a 3 from the wing) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaden Hardy drops in a 3 from the wing

videos.description: Miles McBride gets to the bucket for a tough reverse layup for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Miles McBride drops in reverse layup for New York) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miles McBride drops in reverse layup for New York

videos.description: Jordan Clarkson drives to the front of the rack and floats in an and-1 for the Knicks.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Clarkson floats in and-1 for the Knicks) 2025/11/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clarkson floats in and-1 for the Knicks

videos.description: Daniel Gafford forces his way to the basket and drops in an and-1 for Dallas.

videos.headline: Gafford muscles in and-1 for the Mavs

videos.description: Daniel Gafford gets the ball along the baseline and rattles in the and-1 for the Mavericks.

videos.headline: Gafford gets another and-1 to fall for Dallas

videos.description: Jalen Brunson gets a friendly bounce on a short jumper while drawing contact for the Knicks.

videos.headline: Jalen Brunson gets friendly bounce on and-1

videos.description: Naji Marshall floats in a tough and-1 late in the second quarter for Dallas.
